name: Pate Cregyn Gleision Mucai (Menai Pride Mussel Pate)
recipeInstructions:
1. Finely mince the cooked mussels, celery, carrot, and herring roe.
2. Add mixed herbs, seasoning, breadcrumbs, egg yolks, brandy, and double cream to the minced mixture.
3. Blend all ingredients together until well combined.
4. Pour the mixture into a Sainmarie mold and bake in an oven preheated to 350°F for 1/2 hour.
5. Serve the pate with toast points.
